author: situ2001
description: Arrange the tab group in a more flexible way. For now, it supports arranging evenly and expanded like VSCode. User can make action and switch mode of arrangement by clicking the status bar or executing commands.

manifest.author: situ2001
manifest.description: Arrange the tab group in a more flexible way. For now, it supports arranging evenly and expanded like VSCode. User can make action and switch mode of arrangement by clicking the status bar or executing commands.
manifest.name: Tab Group Arrangement

name: Tab Group Arrangement

releases.author: situ2001
releases.description:
- refine code based on suggestion from https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/5345#issuecomment-2679674619
- rename: editor group => tab group
- increase height & width limit from 250 to 300
